title: Sendinblue vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Sendinblue vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Sendinblue and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Sendinblue is built for transactional email and SMS campaigns, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and SMS campaigns
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Sendinblue wins for transactional email and SMS campaigns, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Sendinblue or Mailgun?
faq.a: Mailgun starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Sendinblue?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
